## Messages

### DataProcessingCapabilities

DataProcessingCapabilities advertises the data shapes,
materializations, partition kinds, and aggregators the producer
supports. Rimsky cross-checks template `data:` declarations against
this set at canonicalization time when `validation` is also
advertised; producer-side Validate.Validate is the authoritative
gate.

| Field | Type | # | Description |
|-------|------|---|-------------|
| `data_shapes` | `repeated string` | 1 | e.g. "parquet", "geo-parquet", "postgis-table". |
| `materializations` | `repeated string` | 2 | e.g. "full", "partitioned", "iceberg". |
| `partition_kinds` | `repeated string` | 3 | e.g. "date_range", "region_list", "hash", "bounding_box", "h3_grid", "attribute_value". |
| `aggregators` | `repeated string` | 4 | e.g. "map_partitioned", "union", "merge", "reduce", "collect", "first". |

### BeginCandidateRequest

BeginCandidateRequest is called inside the rimsky-side acquisition
transaction for fan-out sub-claims. The producer allocates a staging
candidate (e.g. a unique S3 prefix) keyed by idempotency_key
(rimsky-side run_id-derived) and returns an opaque candidate_handle
rimsky persists on col:rimsky_claim_handles.producer_candidate_handle.

| Field | Type | # | Description |
|-------|------|---|-------------|
| `claim_handle_id` | `string` | 1 |  |
| `sub_scope_descriptor` | `bytes` | 2 |  |
| `idempotency_key` | `string` | 3 |  |

### BeginCandidateResponse

| Field | Type | # | Description |
|-------|------|---|-------------|
| `candidate_handle` | `bytes` | 1 |  |

### CommitCandidateRequest

CommitCandidateRequest finalizes the candidate at leaf-run success.
candidate_metadata is opaque-to-rimsky producer-side info about the
candidate (e.g. row count, byte size, partition stats); surfaces via
the parent's writeback if the producer threads it through Commit.

| Field | Type | # | Description |
|-------|------|---|-------------|
| `candidate_handle` | `bytes` | 1 |  |

### CommitCandidateResponse

| Field | Type | # | Description |
|-------|------|---|-------------|
| `candidate_metadata` | `bytes` | 1 |  |

### AbandonCandidateRequest

AbandonCandidateRequest is called at leaf-run failure or
strict-cancel-siblings cancellation. The producer GCs the candidate.

| Field | Type | # | Description |
|-------|------|---|-------------|
| `candidate_handle` | `bytes` | 1 |  |
